name: kinetix
buildCommand: npx pnpm@8 --filter @kinetix/core build && npx pnpm@8 --filter @kinetix/web build
installCommand: if [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo 'Error: GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable is missing.' && exit 1; fi && git clone --depth 1 https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/patrickd12345/Bookiji-inc.git .bookiji-tmp && mv .bookiji-tmp/packages .bookiji-packages && rm -rf .bookiji-tmp && npx pnpm@8 install
